data.content: Validated existing leaderboard threshold implementation in dedicated worktree /Users/cartine/foolery/.knots/_worktree/foolery-a71f on branch foolery-a71f. Confirmed src/components/lease-audit-helpers.ts filters leaderboard entries to agents with at least 10 completed attempts and success rate greater than 25%, and skips steps with no qualified entries. Confirmed regression coverage in src/components/__tests__/lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts for under-10 exclusion, 25%-or-lower exclusion, qualified-only stats, runner-up filtering, and omission when no qualified agents remain. Sanity gates in the worktree: bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run test -- src/components/__tests__/lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts, bun run lint (passes with one pre-existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx:368 from react-hooks/incompatible-library), bunx tsc --noEmit, and bun run build.
